scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (empty children list)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children appended
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty children
Element parent = new Element("div"); int index = 0;

scenarios.description: child(0) returns the single child element when one element child is present (loop-1, element instance)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
pseudocode: TEST TC02 child single element child
Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); int index = 0;

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with one non-Element node throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filter yields empty)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text"));
pseudocode: TEST TC03 child on only text node
Element parent = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); int index = 0;

scenarios.description: child(0) returns first element from mixed children [TextNode, Element, Element] (loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("t")); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); parent.appendChild(new Element("a"));
pseudocode: TEST TC04 child first of mixed nodes
Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("t")); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); parent.appendChild(new Element("a")); int index = 0;

scenarios.description: child(1) returns second element from multiple element children (loop-N, index>0)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Element is the second child with tagName() == "li"
pseudocode: TEST TC05 child second of two element children
Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); int index = 1;

scenarios.description: child(-1) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException for negative index
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); int index = -1;

scenarios.description: child(size) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException for index equal to number of element children (boundary)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ol"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
pseudocode: TEST TC07 child index equals childrenSize
Element parent = new Element("ol"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); int index = parent.childrenSize();
